gaps.title: Add TraitBloomReactive for bloom_state-driven mesh/emissive animation (A-009 example-driven request)
gaps.description: While refreshing examples/lotus-flower/garden.holo, the refresh needed to animate petal glow intensity and mesh scale as a pure function of a `bloom_state` enum (sealed/budding/blooming/full/wilted). Currently this requires an @animated trait with manually authored keyframes plus a separate @glowing block — two traits doing what should be one declarative binding. A @bloom_reactive { state: <var>, sealed: { emissive: 0.1, scale: 0.9 }, budding: { emissive: 0.4, scale: 0.95 }, blooming: { emissive: 1.2, scale: 1.0, pulse: true }, full: { emissive: 2.5, scale: 1.05, pulse_fast: true }, wilted: { emissive: 0.05, scale: 0.85 } } trait would encode the full lifecycle in one semantic block. Required by the lotus garden and any future procedural-growth scene. Suggested home: packages/core/src/traits/constants/nature-life.ts or a new biology.ts category.
